options.infoText: Number of Calves (head) -- The initial number of pre-weaned calves
Number of HeiferI's (head) -- The initial number of heifers that are weaned but not yet bred
Number of HeiferII's (head) -- The initial number of heifers that are either eligible for breeding (based on user-inputted Breeding Start Day for heifers), or in early pregnancy
Number of HeiferIII's (head) -- The initial number of close-up heifers (heifers within the user-defined close-up period, i.e. Prefresh Day)
Number of Cows (head) -- The initial number of dry and lactating cows
Herd Number (head) -- The target number of dry and lactating cows on the farm
Replacements (head) -- Number of replacement animals available in the replacement market
Breed (select one Holstein/Jersey) -- The predominant breed of the herd (Holstein or Jersey)
Herd Demographics
The initial number of animals for the simulation starting with to generate the herd
The number of days to simulate for generating the herd
Animal generation related inputs
Heifer Breeding Start Day (days) -- Days old when RuFaS initiates estrus protocol (first cycle to occur ~21 days later)
Heifer Reproduction Protocol (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; Synch-ED - Synchronized Estrus Detection
Cow Reproduction Protocol (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; ED-TAI - Combination of ED and TAI
Semen type (select one) -- The semen type (sexed or conventional) that makes up a majority of the farm's breedings
Days In Pregnancy When Dry (days) -- The average days in pregnancy of cows at dry-off
Heifer Reproduction Cull Time (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be culled for failure to become pregnant
Cow Do Not Breed Time (days) -- The length of the breeding period after parturition for cows after which reproduction protocols stop if they fail to get pregnant
Cull Milk Production (kg/d) -- Milk production threshold at which 'do not breed' cows are culled if they fall below
Number of Milkings (per day) -- The average or most common number of times cows are milked per day (1, 2, or 3 times daily)
General Management
Male Calf Rate, Sexed Semen (percent) -- The rate of male calves when using sexed semen
Male Calf Rate, Conventional Semen (percent) -- The rate of male calves when using conventional semen
Female Calf Retention Rate (percent) -- The percentage of female calves kept and raised on-farm
Wean Day (days) -- The days of age at which calves are fully weaned from milk or milk replacer
Wean Length (days) -- Length of the weaning process
Milk Type (select one) -- The type of milk that is used to feed calves (Whole or Replacer)
Calf Management

Voluntary Waiting Period (days) -- If TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) protocol is chosen for cows, voluntary waiting period (VPW) is days after parturition at which the 1st hormonal injection is made. If ED (Estrus Detection) or ED-TAI (combination of Estrus Detection and TAI) is chosen for cows, VWP is days after parturition when a cow is eligible to be bred during estrus
Conception Rate Decrease (percent) -- The percent decrease in conception rate of each breeding after the first breeding
Average Gestation Length (days) -- Average length of gestation
Gestation Length Standard Deviation (days) -- Standard deviation of gestation length
Prefresh Day -- days prior to calving at which pregnant animals enter the close-up period (i.e., the length of the close-up period)
Calving Interval (days) -- Current average calving interval, used for initial bodyweight adjustment and other calculations
Estrus Detection Rate (percent) -- The percentage of total heifers in estrus that are detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol
Estrus Conception Rate (percent) -- The percentage of inseminated heifers that become pregnant in the ED (Estrus Detection) and SynchED protocols
Conception Rate -- The conception rate for the heifer reproductive program (default is 0.6)
Estrus Detection Rate -- The % of in-heat animals that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)
Heifer Reproduction Protocols
Estrus Detection Rate -- The % of in-heat animals that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)
Estrus Conception Rate -- The % of inseminated animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)
Presynch Protocol -- The preSynch protocol (1st breeding) for cow in TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program
Resynch Protocol -- Resynch protocol for cow before/at/after pregnancy check day in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program
Conception Rate -- The conception rate for the cow reproductive program (default is 0.6)
TAI program start day for ED-TAI protocol -- The TAI program start day for ED-TAI protocol.
Estrus Detection Rate (percent) -- The percentage of total animals in estrus that are detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol
Estrus Service Rate (percent) -- The percentage of animals detected in estrus that then would be serviced in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol
ED Conception Rate (percent) -- The percentage of serviced animals that become pregnant in the ED (Estrus Detection) protocol
Cow Presynch Protocol (optional; select one) -- The optional preSynch protocol (1st breeding) for cows in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) protocol
Cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) Protocol (select one) -- The timed AI (Timed Artificial Insemination) protocol for cows
OvSynch56 Conception Rate (percent) -- The conception rate for cows in the OvSynch56 (pre-breeding GnRH shot given 56hrs post prostaglandin) TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) protocol
OvSynch48 Conception Rate (percent) -- The conception rate for cows in the OvSynch 48 (pre-breeding GnRH shot given 48hrs post prostaglandin) TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) protocol
CoSynch72 Conception Rate (percent) -- The conception rate for cows in the CoSynch 72 TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) protocol
5d CoSynch Conception Rate (percent) -- The conception rate for cows in the 5d CoSynch TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) protocol
Cow Resynch Protocol (select one) -- Resynch protocol for cows before/at/after pregnancy check day in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) protocol
TAI protocol start day for the Ovsynch portion of the ED-TAI protocol (day)
Cow Reproduction Protocols
Repro Management
Average Holstein Birth Weight (kg/head)
Holstein Birth Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head)
Average Jersey Birth Weight (kg/head)
Jersey Birth Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head)
Target Heifer Pregnancy Day (days) -- The target age (in days) for heifers to become pregnant - for adjusting heifer body weight
Average Mature Body Weight (kg/head) -- The average mature body weight of cows
Mature Body Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation of mature body weight of cows
Bodyweight
Farm Level Management
Pregnancy Check Days, Check 1 (days) -- Days since last insemination at the 1st pregnancy check
Pregnancy Loss Rate 1 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy before the 1st pregnancy check
Pregnancy Check Days, Check 2 (days) --  Days since last insemination at the second pregnancy check, for cows confirmed pregnant at 1st pregnancy check
Pregnancy Loss Rate, Check 2 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 1st and 2nd pregnancy checks
Pregnancy Check Day, Check 3 (days) -- Days since last insemination at the third pregnancy check, for cows confirmed pregnant at 2nd pregnancy check
Pregnancy Loss Rate, Check 3 (percent) -- The percentage of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 2nd and 3rd pregnancy checks
Average Estrous Cycle Return (days) -- Average days between calving and first estrous cycle after calving
Estrous Cycle Return Standard Deviation (days)
Heifer Estrous Cycle Length (days) -- Average length of estrous cycle for heifers
Heifer Estrous Cycle Length Standard Deviation (days)
Cow Estrous Cycle Length (days) -- Average length of estrous cycle for cows
Cow Estrous Cycle Length Standard Deviation (days)
Average Estrous Cycle days after PGF (days) -- Average days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the PGFatPD resynch protocol
Estrous Cycle days after PGF Standard Deviation (days) -- Standard deviation of days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the PGFatPD resynch protocol
Literature Repro Values
Parameter l in the Wood’s equation. It is a scale factor for the production level.
Parameter l in the Wood’s equation. It is a scale factor for the production level,
Parameter l in the Wood’s equation. It is a scale factor for the production level.
Parameter m in the Wood’s equation. It indicates the growth rate in milk yield until peak
Parameter m in the Wood’s equation. It indicates the growth rate in milk yield until peak
Parameter m in the Wood’s equation. It indicates the growth rate in milk yield until peak
Parameter n in the Wood’s equation. It describes the rate of decline after the peak
Parameter n in the Wood’s equation. It describes the rate of decline after the peak
Parameter n in the Wood’s equation. It describes the rate of decline after the peak
Standard deviation of parameter l
Standard deviation of parameter l
Standard deviation of parameter l
Standard deviation of parameter m
Standard deviation of parameter m
Standard deviation of parameter m
Standard deviation of parameter n
Standard deviation of parameter n
Standard deviation of parameter n
Death Probability, by Parity

Death Probability, by Parity Group -- The probability of death for cows of a single parity group (first lactation, second lactation, etc.); a separate entry should be included for 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 4th+ parities (4 entries total)
Cull Probability, by Parity

Cull Probability, by Parity -- The probability of culling for cows of a single parity (first lactation, second lactation, etc.); a separate entry should be included for 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and 4th+ parities (4 entries total)
Culling probability for mastitis
Culling probability for udder reasons
Culling probability for feet and leg reasons
Culling probability for unknown reasons
Culling probability for disease
Culling probability for injury
Culling probability for death
Culling day count
Probabilities for removal from the herd for specific reason
Rate of stillbirths (percent)
From Literature
Animal Configuration

Methane Mitigation Method (select one) -- The type of enteric methane mitigation supplement that is fed to the lactating cows. Note that default values given are not implemented unless the specific supplement is selected here
3-NOP Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the 3-NOP mitigation additive
Monensin Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the monensin mitigation additive
Essential Oils Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the essential oils mitigation additive
Seaweed Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of seaweed mitigation additive
Methane Mitigation
Housing Type (select one) -- The type of housing management for the herd
Pasture Concentrate Fed (kg/head/day) -- Amount of concentrate provided to lactating cows each day if animals are housed on pasture
Methane Model (select one) -- The method used to estimate enteric methane emissions for lactating cows
User Input -- A bool value indicating if the user will provide the ration or diet formulation they would like to feed to the cattle (true) or not (false).
Formulation Interval (days) -- The length of time in days between when the diets are reformulated
Ration
Pen Information
Pen ID -- The index of the pen
Pen Name -- The name or identifier of a given pen

Animal Combination (select one) -- The valid combinations of animal types that can be in a pen. CALF = Calves; GROWING = HeiferI's and HeiferII's; CLOSE_UP = HeiferIII's and Dry Cows; LAC_COWS = Lactating Cows
Vertical Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The elevation gain (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor
Horizontal Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The distance (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor
Number of Stalls -- The number of stalls in the pen
Housing Type (select one) -- The type of barn the pen is in
Pen Type select one) -- The type of stalls the pen has
Maximum Stocking Density -- The maximum ratio of the number of animals in the pen to the number of stalls in the pen
Manure Management Scenario ID (number) -- The ID number of the manure management practices that are used for this pen (scenarios are defined in manure management schema)
